Help Center

Search answers, find quick fixes, and get support instantly.

General Questions

What is IPTV, what's included, app info.

Setup & Install

Supported devices, Xtream Codes, M3U login.

Common Problems

Buffering, freezing, no channels, black screen.

VPN & ISP

Blocking issues, throttling, connection fixes.

Account & Renew

Device limits, renewal, trial vs paid.

Refunds & Policy

Refund rules, terms, exclusions.

Before Contacting Support

Please check the following first to save time.

  • Check internet speed (minimum 20 Mbps recommended).
  • Restart your modem and router.
  • Restart your streaming device.
  • Clear IPTV app cache (in settings).
  • Refresh playlist and EPG inside the app.
  • Disable VPN (or try a different server).
  • Try another IPTV player to rule out app issues.

Important: IPTV Subscription is separate from the IPTV App. App licenses are not included.

Troubleshooting & FAQ

What is IPTV?

IPTV (Internet Protocol Television) allows you to watch live TV channels, movies, and series through the internet instead of satellite or cable.

What do I receive when I purchase?

You receive an IPTV subscription (playlist/credentials). The player app is NOT included. You must install a compatible IPTV app on your device.

Is the IPTV app included?

No. The subscription and the player app are two different things. Some apps are free, others may require a paid license after a trial.

Can I use any IPTV app?

Yes. You can use any compatible IPTV player that supports Xtream Codes or M3U.

What devices are supported?
  • Android phones & tablets
  • Android TV boxes
  • Amazon Firestick / Fire TV
  • Smart TVs (Samsung, LG, Android TV)
  • Windows & Mac
  • iOS (iPhone & iPad)
Does IPTV work outside Canada?

Yes, IPTV works worldwide as long as you have a stable internet connection.

What information do I need to login?
  • Username
  • Password
  • Server URL (Portal / Host)
What is Xtream Codes?

Xtream Codes is a login method using username, password, and server URL. It is the recommended and most stable method.

What is M3U?

M3U is a playlist link that contains channels. It is supported by most IPTV apps.

Why does login fail?
  • Wrong username or password
  • Extra spaces copied by mistake
  • Incorrect server URL
  • App not compatible
  • Internet or ISP blocking
Channels are buffering or freezing

Possible causes: Weak internet connection, WiFi signal issues, too many devices connected, VPN slowing speed, overloaded device, or outdated app.

Solutions:

  • Restart modem and router
  • Use wired connection if possible
  • Close background apps
  • Disable VPN
  • Restart device
  • Try another IPTV player
No channels showing

Causes: Account not loaded yet, wrong login details, app cache issue, or playlist not refreshed.

Fix: Recheck credentials, Refresh playlist, Clear app cache, Restart the app and device.

No EPG (TV Guide)

Causes: EPG not loaded yet, App EPG settings disabled, App needs manual refresh.

Fix: Enable EPG in app settings, Refresh EPG manually, Wait 5–10 minutes after login.

Some channels not working

Causes: Temporary server maintenance, Channel source offline, ISP blocking specific streams.

Fix: Restart app, Try another channel, Try different player, Disable VPN.

Black screen or loading forever

Causes: App decoding issue, Device overload, Wrong stream format.

Fix: Change decoder in app settings, Restart device, Try another IPTV app.

Do I need a VPN?

VPN is optional. In some cases, VPN can help bypass ISP throttling, but it can also slow down your connection.

IPTV works without VPN but not with VPN

Some VPN servers block IPTV traffic. Try disabling VPN or changing VPN location.

IPTV works with VPN but not without

Your ISP may be throttling IPTV traffic. Try another VPN server or location.

How many devices can I use?

You can only use the number of devices included in your plan at the same time.

What happens if I exceed device limit?

The system may block or disconnect your account automatically.

Can I change devices?

Yes, but switching devices too often may cause temporary blocks for security reasons.

Trial vs Paid subscription
  • Trial: Limited time, testing only.
  • Paid: Full access, stability, priority support.
How do I renew my subscription?

Place a new order using the same email and select “Extend Subscription” at checkout.

Will my data be lost when renewing?

No. Your subscription will be extended on the same account.

Do you offer refunds?

Refunds are only considered if a technical issue cannot be resolved by support.

No refunds for:

  • Device incompatibility without testing
  • Internet or ISP issues
  • VPN problems
  • User setup errors
  • App license fees

Still need help?

Fill out the form below to open a direct email ticket.

Direct support email: contact@iptvv.ca

title.rendered: Fix V12Mate “Cancel Button” Issue – Complete Setup Guide

content.rendered:
V12Mate Setup Guide: Fix Cancel Button Issue

Complete setup tutorial for Fire TV Stick and Android devices - Takes about 5 minutes

If you're seeing only a "Cancel" button when trying to set up V12Mate on your device, this guide will walk you through a simple fix using a free VPN app. This solution works for both Fire TV Stick and Android devices.

We'll install ProtonVPN (a free app), connect it briefly to Netherlands or Mexico, then set up V12Mate. After setup is complete, you can delete ProtonVPN if you wish.

Quick Tip: If you already have a VPN installed on your device, simply connect it to Netherlands or Mexico, then open the V12 app. No need to follow all the steps below.

Step 1: Download ProtonVPN

ProtonVPN is a free, legitimate privacy app that's safe to use and required only for this initial setup.

🔥 For Fire TV Stick

  1. Press the Search button (magnifying glass icon) on your remote
  2. Type "ProtonVPN" using the on-screen keyboard
  3. Select ProtonVPN from the search results
  4. Click the Download or Get button
  5. Wait for the installation to complete

📱 For Android Devices

  1. Open the Google Play Store
  2. Tap the search bar at the top
  3. Type "ProtonVPN"
  4. Select "Proton VPN: Fast & Secure" from the results
  5. Tap Install
  6. Wait for the installation to complete

Video Tutorials

Watch these step-by-step video guides for installing ProtonVPN and connecting to a server:

🔥 Fire TV Stick Video Guide

📱 Android TV Video Guide

Step 2: Connect to Netherlands or Mexico

🔥 For Fire TV Stick

  1. Open the ProtonVPN app you just installed
  2. Create a free account using your email address
  3. Browse the list of available countries
  4. Select either Netherlands or Mexico
  5. Click the Connect button
  6. Wait for the status to show "Connected" (typically 10-20 seconds)

📱 For Android Devices

  1. Tap to open the ProtonVPN app
  2. Create a free account or sign in
  3. On the main screen, tap "Countries" or scroll through the country list
  4. Select either Netherlands or Mexico
  5. Tap the Connect button (usually a large button at the bottom)
  6. Allow VPN permissions if prompted by Android
  7. Wait for the status to show "Connected" (typically 10-20 seconds)

Once you see "Connected", you're ready to proceed to the next step.

Step 3: Configure V12Mate

Keep ProtonVPN connected while completing these steps:

🔥 For Fire TV Stick

  1. Press the Home button on your remote
  2. Navigate to and open the V12Mate app
  3. Select "Add Playlist"
  4. Choose "V12MATE" from the options
  5. Enter your Username (provided in your subscription email)
  6. Enter your Password (provided in your subscription email)
  7. Click "Next"
  8. Wait approximately one minute for your channels to load

📱 For Android Devices

  1. Press the Home button or open your app drawer
  2. Find and tap the V12Mate app
  3. Tap "Add Playlist"
  4. Select "V12MATE" from the options
  5. Enter your Username (provided in your subscription email)
  6. Enter your Password (provided in your subscription email)
  7. Tap "Next" or "OK"
  8. Wait approximately one minute for your channels to load

✓ Success! You should now see your available channels and content.

Step 4: Disconnect or Remove ProtonVPN

Once V12Mate is working, you have two options:

Option 1: Open ProtonVPN and click/tap "Disconnect"

Option 2: Uninstall ProtonVPN completely from your device

V12Mate will continue to work normally without the VPN after the initial setup is complete.

Troubleshooting

Still seeing the "Cancel" button?

  • Verify ProtonVPN displays "Connected" status
  • Force close V12Mate and reopen it while VPN is active
  • Fire TV: Settings → Applications → Manage Installed Applications → V12Mate → Clear cache
  • Android: Settings → Apps → V12Mate → Storage → Clear cache
  • Restart your device and try again

No channels appearing?

Your credentials may be incorrect. Navigate to Settings → Playlists → V12Mate → Xtream Codes Parameters and verify:

  • Username is entered correctly (check for capital letters)
  • Password is entered correctly (check for capital letters)
  • No extra spaces before or after credentials

ProtonVPN connection issues?

  • Try selecting a different server in Netherlands or Mexico
  • Wait 30 seconds and attempt to connect again
  • Ensure your internet connection is stable
  • Android: Check that battery optimization isn't blocking the VPN (Settings → Battery → Battery optimization)

Need Additional Support?

Our support team is available to assist you with any questions

Contact Support

Legal Disclaimer

Important legal information regarding IPTV technology, intellectual property, user responsibility, DMCA concerns, and general website use.

Quick Navigation

  • General Disclaimer
  • Intellectual Property
  • User Responsibility
  • Copyright Concerns (DMCA)
  • No Legal Advice
  • Contact Us

General Disclaimer

At IPTVV Canada, we are committed to providing access to legal IPTV services in compliance with applicable laws. IPTV (Internet Protocol Television) is a lawful technology used to deliver television content over IP networks, similar to other mainstream streaming services.

We do not host, stream, or rebroadcast television channels, movies, or shows on our own servers. We provide access credentials to third-party IPTV service providers, allowing users to access services made available through those providers.

Important: Use of any IPTV service must always comply with the laws and regulations that apply in the user’s own region or country.

Intellectual Property

All trademarks, logos, service marks, brand names, and other identifying marks displayed on this website are the property of their respective owners.

Any reference to such marks is provided strictly for identification, compatibility, and descriptive purposes only and does not imply any affiliation, endorsement, sponsorship, or partnership with IPTVV Canada.

User Responsibility

It is the sole responsibility of the user to ensure that their use of any IPTV service complies with all applicable copyright, licensing, and broadcasting laws in their jurisdiction.

User Obligations

  • Verify whether IPTV usage is permitted under local law
  • Ensure any content accessed is lawful in their region
  • Use services in compliance with all applicable rules and regulations
Notice: IPTVV Canada is not responsible for misuse of services, unauthorized access, or any legal violations committed by end users.

Copyright Concerns (DMCA)

We respect the intellectual property rights of content owners. If you believe that any material accessible through third-party IPTV providers infringes your copyright, please submit a notice through our official DMCA Report Page.

We review all legitimate requests promptly and cooperate with rights holders where appropriate.

DMCA Reporting: To speed up review, provide clear details about the copyrighted work and the allegedly infringing material.

No Legal Advice

The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice, legal opinion, or legal representation.

For any legal concerns or questions regarding copyright, broadcasting, licensing, or IPTV use, you should consult a qualified legal professional in your jurisdiction.

Contact Us

For legal or general inquiries, please contact our team using the options below.

Contact Page contact@iptvv.ca

  • DMCA Review Process
  • False Claims Warning
  • Counter-Notification
  • Submit a Notice

Copyright Protection Policy

IPTVV.ca respects intellectual property rights and complies with the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA). We take copyright infringement seriously and respond promptly to valid notices of alleged copyright violations.

If you believe that content available through our service infringes your copyright, please notify us immediately so we can investigate and take appropriate action.

Important: To help us review your request quickly, include clear and complete information in your notice.

How to File a DMCA Complaint

To submit a valid DMCA takedown notice, please include the following:

1Your Contact Details

  • Your full legal name
  • Email address
  • Phone number
  • Physical mailing address

2Description of the Copyrighted Work

  • Identify the copyrighted work you believe has been infringed
  • Describe the material clearly enough for us to understand your claim

3Location of the Alleged Infringing Material

  • Provide the exact location or description of where the material appears on our service
  • Include URLs, channel names, content titles, or any relevant identifying details

4Required Legal Statements

  • A statement that you have a good faith belief the use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law
  • A statement that the information in your notice is accurate
  • A statement made under penalty of perjury, where applicable
  • Your physical or electronic signature

DMCA Review Process

Once we receive your notice, we review it as quickly as possible and take appropriate action if the complaint is valid.

1
Submit Notice

Send your DMCA complaint with all required details.

2
We Review

Our team checks the notice for completeness and validity.

3
Action Taken

Valid complaints are investigated and addressed within 24 hours.

Response Time Commitment: We process all DMCA requests within 24 hours of receipt. Valid complaints are investigated promptly, and appropriate action is taken in accordance with applicable copyright law.

False Claims Warning

Please note that under Section 512(f) of the DMCA, any person who knowingly materially misrepresents that material is infringing may be subject to liability.

Warning: We recommend consulting legal counsel before submitting a DMCA complaint if you are unsure whether the material is infringing.

Counter-Notification

If you believe content was removed in error, you may submit a counter-notification to the same contact email address.

Counter-Notice Must Include

  • Your name, address, phone number, and email address
  • Identification of the material that was removed or disabled
  • A statement under penalty of perjury that you have a good faith belief the material was removed in error
  • Your consent to the jurisdiction of Canadian courts
  • Your physical or electronic signature

Submit Your DMCA Notice

Send your copyright infringement complaint to our designated contact email:

care@iptvv.ca

For faster handling, please use DMCA Notice in your subject line.

content.rendered:
IPTV Troubleshooting Guide 2025: Fix Buffering, Freezing & Connection Issues Fast

IPTV Troubleshooting Guide 2025

Complete step-by-step solutions to fix buffering, freezing, and connection issues for all IPTV devices and apps.

Quick Navigation

  • Quick Fixes (Start Here)
  • Buffering & Freezing Solutions
  • Login & Connection Problems
  • VPN Setup Guide
  • Best IPTV Players & Setup
  • Advanced Solutions
  • Get Expert Help

Quick Fixes - Start Here

These steps solve most IPTV problems in under 5 minutes:

1
Restart Everything
Unplug modem and router for 30 seconds. Restart your IPTV device and app.
2
Test Internet Speed
Visit fast.com. Need 15+ Mbps for HD, 25+ Mbps for 4K.
3
Use Better Connection
Switch to Ethernet cable or 5GHz Wi-Fi instead of 2.4GHz.
4
Try TiviMate Player
Get TiviMate setup guide for the best IPTV experience.
Still having issues? Continue to the specific troubleshooting sections below.

Buffering & Freezing Solutions

Follow these solutions in order for best results:

Step 1: Change Your IPTV Player (Most Important)

Why this works: Poor players cause 90% of buffering issues. Most TV apps can't handle IPTV properly.

Best solution: Switch to TiviMate player. It has better buffering, hardware acceleration, and network optimization.

How to get it:

  • Visit our TiviMate setup guide
  • Download from Google Play Store or sideload for Firestick
  • Configure using our tutorial
Test for 24 hours. If buffering continues after switching to TiviMate, proceed to Step 2.

Step 2: Use VPN for ISP Throttling

When to use: If TiviMate didn't fix buffering, your ISP is slowing down IPTV traffic.

Why this happens: Internet providers detect streaming and slow it down during busy hours (6-11 PM).

Solution: Use our VPN setup guide with ProtonVPN (free option available).

Expected results: Most users see immediate improvement within 5 minutes.

Step 3: Network Optimization

If Steps 1 and 2 didn't completely solve buffering:

  • Use Ethernet cable - most stable for 4K streaming
  • 5GHz Wi-Fi only - avoid crowded 2.4GHz networks
  • Close background apps - free up bandwidth
  • Position router properly - central location, no interference

Login & Connection Problems

Can't connect to your IPTV service? Follow these steps:

Step 1: Check Your Credentials

Most common cause: 70% of login failures are typing errors.

What to verify:

  • Re-type username and password manually (don't copy-paste)
  • Check for extra spaces before or after text
  • Verify server URL is exactly correct
  • Confirm subscription hasn't expired

Step 2: VPN for Connection Issues

When to use: If credentials are correct but login still fails.

Why VPN helps: Some ISPs block IPTV servers, causing connection timeouts even with correct login details.

Signs you need VPN:

  • Getting "connection timeout" or "server unreachable" errors
  • Login worked before but suddenly stopped
  • Other internet services work fine

Solution: Connect to our VPN setup first, then try logging in.

Step 3: Reset App & Device

If VPN doesn't help with login:

  • Clear app data: Settings → Apps → [IPTV App] → Storage → Clear all
  • Restart device: Complete power cycle
  • Re-enter everything: Input all credentials fresh
  • Test different network: Try mobile data to test

VPN Setup Guide

Why you need VPN for IPTV: Most ISPs slow down or block IPTV traffic. A VPN hides your streaming and often provides better server connections.

ProtonVPN - Best Free Option

Why ProtonVPN works:

  • Completely free with no data limits
  • Fast servers in Mexico and Netherlands
  • Works on all devices including Firestick and Android TV
  • No logs policy for privacy

Android TV / Google TV Setup:

  1. Open Google Play Store
  2. Search and install "ProtonVPN"
  3. Create free account (no credit card needed)
  4. Connect to Mexico server
  5. Test your IPTV streaming

Amazon Firestick Setup:

  1. Go to Firestick home screen
  2. Search "ProtonVPN" in Amazon Appstore
  3. Install and create free account
  4. Connect to Netherlands server
  5. Test streaming
Test Results: After connecting VPN, try channels that were buffering. Most users see immediate improvement.

Alternative VPN Options

If ProtonVPN isn't available:

  • Surfshark - Good for multiple devices
  • NordVPN - Fast streaming servers
  • ExpressVPN - Premium option

Best IPTV Players & Setup

The right player makes all the difference. Here are the best options:

TiviMate - Best Overall Player

Why TiviMate is best: Built specifically for IPTV with advanced buffering, EPG support, and device optimization.

Get TiviMate: Visit our complete TiviMate setup guide.

Best TiviMate settings:

  • Video Decoder: Hardware (HW+)
  • Buffer Size: Large or Auto
  • Network: Enable faster playlist loading
  • EPG: Auto-refresh every 12 hours

Alternative Players

IPTV Smarters Pro

  • Available on most app stores
  • Good for older devices
  • Free with basic features

VLC Media Player

  • Works on everything
  • Good for troubleshooting
  • Manual playlist loading

Device Optimization

Android TV:

  • Clear cache: Settings → Apps → [IPTV App] → Storage → Clear cache
  • Close background apps regularly
  • Use 5GHz Wi-Fi only
  • Keep 2GB+ storage free

Firestick:

  • Clear cache: Settings → Applications → Manage Installed Apps
  • Restart weekly (unplug 30 seconds)
  • Close apps: Hold home + menu buttons for 10 seconds
  • Disable auto-updates during streaming

Advanced Solutions

Black Screen Issues

Symptoms: Audio plays but no video, or complete black screen.

Solutions:

  1. Change video decoder in app settings (Hardware/Software/ExoPlayer)
  2. Try different channel to test
  3. Check HDMI cable and port
  4. Lower video resolution to 1080p temporarily
  5. Clear app data and re-enter credentials

Audio Problems

No sound or audio sync issues:

  1. Check volume, unmute, try different channels
  2. Change audio track in player settings
  3. Check device audio output settings
  4. If using soundbar, verify all connections
  5. Restart IPTV app completely

TV Guide (EPG) Issues

Missing or wrong TV guide:

  1. Verify EPG URL is correctly entered
  2. Force update EPG in app settings
  3. Check device timezone matches your location
  4. Clear app cache and refresh EPG

VOD (Movies/Series) Problems

Video-on-Demand not loading:

  1. Press play, pause for 3-5 minutes to pre-buffer
  2. Try opening with VLC or MX Player
  3. Select different quality if available
  4. Try during off-peak hours

Need Help?

Contact our support team:

Email: contact@iptvv.ca | WhatsApp: (571) 351-9854

When contacting support, please include:

  • Your device type (Firestick, Android TV, etc.)
  • IPTV app you're using (TiviMate, IPTV Smarters, etc.)
  • Exact error message or problem description
  • Your internet speed test result from fast.com

Terms & Conditions

Last updated: September 1, 2025

Welcome to IPTVV.ca. We provide an online video streaming service that allows users to browse and enjoy a variety of live and on-demand programs. By accessing or using our services, you agree to the following Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully.

For information on how we handle your data, please review our Privacy Policy.

1. Changes to the Terms & Conditions

We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions, including our Privacy Policy, at any time and at our sole discretion. Any modifications will become effective immediately upon posting.

By continuing to use our Service, you accept these updates. If you disagree with any changes, you should discontinue using the platform.

2. Minimum Age Requirement

To use IPTVV.ca services, you must be 18 years old or older. By signing up, you confirm that you meet this age requirement.

3. Usage & Service Terms

You agree to use our Service legally and responsibly. Unauthorized activities include but are not limited to:

  • ❌ Re-streaming, redistributing, broadcasting, or transmitting content without permission
  • ❌ Using bots, scripts, or automation to access or interact with our platform
  • ❌ Circumventing security measures or attempting unauthorized access
  • ❌ Each subscription is for one device only — sharing the same account is not allowed and will lead to suspension without refund.

Violating these terms may result in immediate suspension or termination of your access.

4. Third-Party Purchases

Any transactions or purchases made through third-party vendors found on our platform, including "click-to-purchase" links, are solely between you and the vendor. IPTVV.ca is not responsible for third-party transactions.

5. Streaming Quality & Performance

The quality of your streaming experience depends on multiple factors, including:

  • ✔ Your internet speed and stability
  • ✔ The capabilities of your device
  • ✔ The number of devices connected to the same network
  • ✔ Your geographic location

While we strive to provide high-quality streams, IPTVV.ca cannot guarantee uninterrupted service due to these external factors. Sharing a subscription may lead to account suspension or a device ban.

6. Subscription Payments & Refund Policy

All subscription payments and used credits are final and non-refundable.

Once a purchase is completed, refunds or cancellations will not be issued unless required by law. Please review your subscription details before confirming payment.

7. VPN & Proxy Usage

Using a VPN or proxy server is permitted when connecting to IPTVV.ca. However, misuse of VPN services to bypass geographical restrictions or violate terms may result in restricted access or account termination.

8. Accuracy of Information

All information provided to IPTVV.ca must be accurate, complete, and up to date. You are responsible for keeping your account credentials secure. IPTVV.ca will never request your password. Any unauthorized activity on your account is your responsibility.

9. Device Compatibility

To access our services, you must use devices that meet our system and compatibility requirements. IPTVV.ca does not guarantee functionality on all devices. Before subscribing, check our Help Center for supported devices.

10. Internet Service & Data Usage

Users are responsible for any internet or data costs associated with accessing IPTVV.ca. Your network provider may charge fees for high data usage.

11. Subscription Sharing Policy

Subscriptions cannot be shared between multiple users. Only one active stream is permitted at a time. Purchasing additional subscriptions allows streaming on multiple devices simultaneously.

Violation of this policy may lead to account suspension.

12. Purchase & Payment Details

Purchases must follow the ordering procedures outlined on IPTVV.ca. Pricing, payment methods, and delivery details are subject to change without prior notice.

13. Service Downtime & Suspension

At times, access to IPTVV.ca may be temporarily unavailable due to:

  • 🔹 System maintenance
  • 🔹 Unexpected server outages
  • 🔹 Network disruptions beyond our control

Additionally, IPTVV.ca reserves the right to suspend or terminate access if a user violates these Terms and Conditions, engages in fraudulent activities, or misuses the service.

14. Legal Compliance & Termination

IPTVV.ca reserves the right to restrict, suspend, or terminate your access to the service without prior notice if:

  • ✔ You breach these Terms & Conditions
  • ✔ You violate any applicable law, rule, or regulation
  • ✔ You attempt unauthorized access or disrupt service operations

By using IPTVV.ca, you acknowledge that legal action may be taken in cases of serious violations.

15. Copyright & Intellectual Property

The IPTVV.ca logo, brand name, graphics, and scripts are registered trademarks of IPTVV.ca. These assets cannot be copied, downloaded, or used without prior written permission.

Unauthorized use of IPTVV.ca trademarks may lead to legal action.
